title: Custom node fails to upload file due to missing parameter
symptom: The custom node for uploading a CSV file returns an error stating 'missing file-name parameter'. This occurs even though the same parameters work in the HTTP Request node.
applies_when: Using a custom node to upload files
File upload is configured as multipart/form-data
not_this_if: Using the standard HTTP Request node
root_cause: The custom node was manually constructing the multipart/form-data request, which conflicted with n8n's HTTP proxy/wrapper. This led to malformed requests that did not include the correct Content-Length or had chunking issues, causing the API to not recognize the file parameter.
fix_steps: Set a flag to indicate that the request is form data (isFormData = true).
Use the correct method to retrieve the binary data stream instead of forcing manual import.
Construct the body correctly with the file-name parameter and ensure it is assigned to the formData option.
agent_instruction: Ensure the request is properly configured to use formData for file uploads in the custom node.
